description:
Build patient-facing auth surfaces backed by Cognito and aligned to the design system.

**Scope**
- Create sign-up, sign-in, verification, password reset, and sign-out routes/components for the product area.
- Configure MFA behavior using Cognito-supported factors. Prefer a low-friction launch posture unless counsel or certification requires step-up MFA for sensitive views.
- Keep all copy clear that Apoth is the technology platform and MDI handles clinical care.
- Honor `RULES.md`: no clinical blue, no gradient text, patient-readable type, and no PHI in logs or analytics.

**Acceptance**
- Signup -> email verification -> first sign-in works end-to-end against a test Cognito pool.
- Password reset and sign-out are tested.
- Visual review confirms auth screens fit the Apoth design system and mobile layouts.
title: Sign-up / sign-in UI + Cognito MFA posture
